milestoneTitle: Phase M9.18b.1 — Fix TDZ crash on initial load. DASH_DUMMY_PROJECT and DASH_DUMMY_LESSON were declared as `const` adjacent to their renderers (~L3048, ~L3148), but renderContinueCard / renderDashLearn are hoisted function declarations fired by replayHomeAnimations during the initial applyFilter('home') at L602. That call reads the dummies from inside the TDZ, throws ReferenceError, and silently aborts the rest of the IIFE — which killed subsequent bindings (data-chip click handlers, etc.) and left the first-load Dashboard non-functional until the user navigated away and back (which triggered a re-render after the IIFE's module-level const lines had finally been evaluated). Hoist the two const dummies to the top-of-file 'Hoisted module state' block (~L288) per the CLAUDE.md TDZ rule.
